.github/workflows/maven.yml.general_idea: Update the GitHub Actions workflow to use JDK 21 instead of JDK 17 for the build environment.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to enable compilation for the new JDK version.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 17, failing to utilize Java 21 features or potentially causing incompatibility if the target environment enforces JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-checkstyle-plugin to a newer snapshot version.
Upgrade jacoco-maven-plugin to a newer snapshot version.

services/auth/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
services/auth/pom.xml.why_exists: Code using Java 21 features (e.g., virtual threads, pattern matching enhancements) will fail to compile if the compiler target remains at 17.

services/auth/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.11 to 3.3.13.
services/auth/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespaces; running Spring Boot 2.x code on a Java 21-targeted project with Spring Boot 3 dependencies causes classpath conflicts and missing class errors.

services/auth/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace springdoc-openapi-ui with springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
services/auth/pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact relies on javax.servlet and Spring MVC 5.x APIs which are removed in Spring Boot 3 (Jakarta EE migration), causing compile-time errors.
commons-lang is obsolete and may conflict with modern libraries expecting org.apache.commons.lang3; while not strictly a JDK break, it's a necessary migration for modern Spring Boot 3 stacks.

services/auth/pom.xml.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 with Hamcrest JUnit and exclude JUnit 4 to align with modern testing standards.
Update maven-compiler-plugin to 3.15.1-SNAPSHOT and add release flag.

services/auth/src/main/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Replace deprecated antMatchers with requestMatchers in Spring Security configuration.
services/auth/src/main/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: The method antMatchers() was removed in Spring Security 6 (required by Spring Boot 3.x), causing a compilation error.

services/auth/src/main/resources/applica.general_idea: Rename deprecated Spring Boot 2.x server context path property to Spring Boot 3.x standard.
services/auth/src/main/resources/applica.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x removes support for the legacy 'server.contextPath' property; using it results in the property being ignored or a binding error, failing to set the context path as intended.

services/auth/src/main/resources/applica.general_idea: Rename deprecated Spring Boot 2.x multipart file size properties to Spring Boot 3.x standard.
services/auth/src/main/resources/applica.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x removes support for 'spring.http.multipart.*' properties; using them results in the properties being ignored, potentially causing runtime errors when file uploads exceed default limits.

services/auth/src/main/resources/applica.general_idea: Rename deprecated Spring Boot 2.x multipart request size properties to Spring Boot 3.x standard.
services/auth/src/main/resources/applica.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x removes support for 'spring.http.multipart.*' properties; using them results in the properties being ignored, potentially causing runtime errors when request sizes exceed default limits.

services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 annotations to JUnit 5 equivalents.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations like @Before and @Test are not recognized by the JUnit 5 engine, causing tests to be skipped or fail to execute.

services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 runner with JUnit 5 support.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: The @RunWith(SpringRunner.class) annotation is JUnit 4 specific and causes compilation or runtime errors when using JUnit 5 as the test engine.

services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Update imports from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: Classes like org.junit.Test and org.junit.Before do not exist in JUnit 5, leading to compilation errors.

services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Update imports from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x uses Jakarta EE 9+, so javax.persistence classes are no longer available, causing compilation errors.

services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Update assertion imports from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: org.junit.Assert classes are not part of JUnit 5, causing compilation errors if used.

services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Add explicit import for Hamcrest MatcherAssert.
Migrate test annotation from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 classes like org.junit.Test are no longer supported or may cause runtime failures in test execution.

services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @Ignore annotation with JUnit 5 @Disabled annotation.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: org.junit.Ignore is not available in JUnit 5; using it causes a compile error or missing class at runtime.

services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 @Test annotation with JUnit 5 @Test annotation.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: org.junit.Test is not available in JUnit 5; using it causes a compile error or missing class at runtime.

services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation.
Replace JUnit 4 imports with JUnit 5 (Jupiter) equivalents to align with Spring Boot 3.x test requirements.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes (org.junit.Test, org.junit.After) are not available or compatible with the JUnit 5 platform used by Spring Boot 3.x; compilation fails if old imports are kept without the vintage engine, and migration intent is to use native JUnit 5.

services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 runner annotation and dependency import as Spring Boot 3.x uses JUnit 5 platform natively.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: The @RunWith annotation is JUnit 4 specific and causes compilation errors or runtime failures in a JUnit 5 environment; Spring Boot 3.x does not support JUnit 4 runners without the vintage engine.

services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Update assertion imports from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 to match the new test framework.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: org.junit.Assert classes are not part of JUnit 5; using them without the vintage engine leads to compilation errors or missing class exceptions.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.before:
import static org.junit.Assert.assertThat;
import static org.junit.Assert.assertTrue;

services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Rename lifecycle annotation from JUnit 4 @After to JUnit 5 @AfterEach.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: @After is a JUnit 4 annotation; JUnit 5 requires @AfterEach for post-test execution. Using @After in a JUnit 5 test class results in it being ignored or causing compilation issues if the class is not recognized as JUnit 4.

services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Migrate test annotations from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 annotations like @RunWith and imports from org.junit are incompatible or deprecated, causing compilation errors or test execution failures.

services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Update static import for assertThat to use Hamcrest directly instead of JUnit 4 wrapper.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: The import static org.junit.Assert.assertThat is removed in JUnit 5 migration context; using Hamcrest's MatcherAssert is the standard replacement to avoid missing symbol errors.

services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Migrate test class from JUnit 4 annotations to JUnit 5 (Jupiter) annotations.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: JUnit 4 runner and annotations are not recognized by JUnit 5 platform; tests will fail to execute or compile if the runner is missing and Jupiter annotations are not used.

services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 static import for assertThat with Hamcrest static import.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: org.junit.Assert is part of JUnit 4; while often available via transitive dependencies, explicit migration to Hamcrest or JUnit 5 assertions is required for clean JUnit 5 migration.

services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Replace String.format with String.formatted for string interpolation.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: String.formatted is a new API introduced in Java 15; this change is a modernization/polishment, not a breaking fix for Java 21 compatibility (String.format still works).

services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Migrate test class from JUnit 4 to JUnit 5 by replacing imports and annotations.
services/auth/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: JUnit 4 annotations and runner are not compatible with JUnit 5 test execution engines; tests will fail to run or be discovered without this migration.

services/desc/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties from Java 17 to Java 21.
services/desc/pom.xml.why_exists: Code using Java 21 language features (e.g., pattern matching for switch, sealed classes) will fail to compile with source/target set to 17.

services/desc/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version from 2.7.11 to 3.3.13.
services/desc/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17+ and uses Jakarta EE namespaces (jakarta.* instead of javax.*); keeping 2.7.x prevents migration to modern Spring ecosystem and may cause runtime classpath conflicts with other upgraded dependencies.
commons-lang is deprecated and may not be compatible with newer build environments or security scanners; commons-lang3 is the maintained successor.
JUnit 4 is likely provided transitively by Spring Boot Starter Test or hamcrest-junit; explicit declaration is redundant and may cause version conflicts.

services/desc/pom.xml.general_idea: Add release flag to maven-compiler-plugin configuration.
services/desc/pom.xml.why_exists: Using <release> is the modern, recommended way to set compiler source/target in Maven, ensuring consistent bytecode generation for the target JDK.

services/mock/src/main/resources/applica.general_idea: Update Spring Boot resource cache configuration property prefix from deprecated 'spring.resources' to 'spring.web.resources' for Spring Boot 3.x compatibility.
services/mock/src/main/resources/applica.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x removed the 'spring.resources' namespace; using it results in a configuration binding error or ignored property at runtime.

services/mock/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 test annotation to JUnit 5 to align with Spring Boot 3.x requirements.
services/mock/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5; JUnit 4 classes like org.junit.Test are no longer supported or may cause runtime failures in test execution.

services/mock/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Replace JUnit 4 runner annotation with JUnit 5 native support.
services/mock/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: The @RunWith annotation is from JUnit 4 and is ignored or causes conflicts in JUnit 5 environments; Spring Boot 3.x requires JUnit 5.

services/mock/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Update persistence API imports from javax to jakarta namespace.
services/mock/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x uses Jakarta EE 9+, so javax.persistence classes are no longer available, causing compile errors.

services/mock/src/test/java/ru/checkdev/.general_idea: Remove unused Spring JUnit 4 runner class import.
